meta.title: IT Help — Free Community Repair
meta.description: Free IT support for individuals and non-profit organisations. Community technicians help with computers, laptops, Wi-Fi, and more.

hub.title: Fix your computer, reinstall your OS, solve any IT problem
hub.subtitle: RevampIT connects you with community technicians — free or fairly paid.

request.title: Request help
request.description: Describe your issue and receive offers from technicians

technicians.title: Choose a technician
technicians.description: Browse profiles and contact someone directly

browse.title: Open requests
browse.description: Help as a technician — requests near you

offerHelp.title: Can you repair devices?
offerHelp.description: Register as a technician and help people nearby.

page.title: IT Help
page.ctaDescription: Register as a technician and help people nearby. For free or for payment — your choice.

detail.expiredBanner: This request expired on {date} and is no longer accepting new offers.

create.title: Create a repair request
create.description: Choose a device and describe your problem. The community will help.
create.sectionDevice: What would you like to repair?
create.budgetDescription: What's the maximum you're willing to pay? Leave empty for free community help.
create.serviceTypeLabel: How should the repair be done?
create.aiPlaceholder: e.g. My MacBook Pro 2019 won't start, screen stays black after pressing the power button...

myRequests.title: My repair requests
myRequests.description: Manage your requests and view received offers
myRequests.fetchError: Could not load requests. Please reload the page.
myRequests.emptyNoFilterMessage: Create your first repair request and get help from the community.

myOffers.title: My offers
myOffers.description: Offers you've submitted for repair requests

myOffers.emptyNoFilterMessage: Browse repair requests and help other community members.
myOffers.withdrawConfirm: Are you sure you want to withdraw this offer?
